notes: Guided interactive onboarding tour. Self-contained install (macOS + Windows) — ffmpeg, exiftool, Node and the Remotion graphics runtime are bundled, so graphics and every tool work offline with no setup. Crash-proofed the DaVinci Resolve connection; Resolve 21+ with IPC off the UI thread, auto-recovery and Resync. Local-first AI (on-device metadata & take detection; Claude API optional). Folder-organization templates + first-run setup wizard. Camera-RAW (BRAW/R3D) handling. Optional AI-model pre-download, drag-drop fixes, built-in update checker + anonymous telemetry.
